Event: The Moon Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 01/09/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: B26
Reborn Bow

When attacking, has a 20% chance of dealing 75% damage to a group of enemies.
Once in a while, the unit charges their bow with the power of ice for 6 sec. The bow gains the following effects:
- The unit's shots cast stiffness on the target. The target's attack speed is reduced by 20% for 3 sec.
- The unit's shots deal an additional 144000 physical damage.

- Every 3 shot deals 160000 pure damage to the target and all enemies in a small radius around it.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
